initiatives.name: Brown Berets De Houston
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization dedicated to community empowerment and social justice in Houston. Through mutual aid and direct action, they work to support local communities, advocate for justice, and build solidarity networks across the city.

initiatives.name: Bayou Action Street Health
initiatives.description: Street medic collective out of Houston.

initiatives.name: West Street Recovery
initiatives.description: West Street Recovery was formed during Hurricane Harvey by a group of people who came together to perform rescues, distribute food and water, and meet the needs of flood survivors.

initiatives.name: Houston Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Feeding the hungry, viral on social media for receiving ticket citations for their food programs.

initiatives.name: Space City Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: Harm reduction info, resources and supplies for health self-management in the greater Houston, TX area.

initiatives.name: The Mahogany Project
initiatives.description: The Mahogany Project aims to reduce social isolation, stigma, and acts of injustice in TQLGB+ Communities of Color.

initiatives.name: Space City Anarchist Organization
initiatives.description: Federation of anarchist collectives in the so-called "Greater Houston Area" working together to prefigure an anarchist future.

initiatives.name: Houseless Distro HTX
initiatives.description: Mutual aid collective that delivers shelter, aid, and builds community with our unhoused neighbors in Houston, Texas.

initiatives.name: Northside Anarchist Collective
initiatives.description: Grassroots group based out of so-called Northwest Houston and the surrounding areas. We are here to build community.

initiatives.name: Street Value HTX
initiatives.description: SV's primary focus is overdose prevention, safe supply distribution, and becoming Houston's first sustainable above ground drug-user health program

initiatives.name: Queers for Palestine Houston
initiatives.description: Queers4PalestineHTX is a decentralized, grassroots collective of LGBTQ+ people and allies focused on direct action for Palestinian Liberation.

initiatives.name: Southeast Tejas Brown Beret Organization
initiatives.description: Preserving the past, protecting the present, and creating a future.

initiatives.name: Liberate HTX
initiatives.description: The Houston Abolitionist Collective is a group of organizers committed to building power and a movement around abolition in Houston and Harris County.
